rules.message: DateTime fields should not be used for relationships - split into Date and Time
Healthcare analytics require a proper calendar table for time intelligence
Patient counts must use DISTINCTCOUNT aggregation
SLA thresholds should be parameterized, not hard-coded
Patient Details dashboard requires proper RLS and audit logging

rules.description: Verify DateTime fields are properly split and modeled
rules.check: Ensure DateTime columns are split into separate Date and Time columns
rules.healthcare_reason: Healthcare analytics require precise time-based analysis for patient flow

rules.description: Verify calendar table exists for time intelligence
rules.check: Confirm calendar table is present and properly related to fact tables
rules.healthcare_reason: Required for patient admission trending and capacity planning

rules.check: All patient counting measures must use DISTINCTCOUNT aggregation
rules.healthcare_reason: Prevents double-counting patients across multiple records

rules.check: SLA thresholds should not be hard-coded in DAX measures
rules.healthcare_reason: SLA targets may vary by department or change over time

rules.check: Patient Details dashboard requires RLS and audit logging
rules.healthcare_reason: HIPAA requires protection of patient identifiable information
